title: Opening for Store Manager at Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates!
